projects.title: Personal Website
projects.description: A portfolio site documenting my journey as a first-gen college student — featuring an About page, Resume, Projects, Contact Form, and an AI chatbot.

projects.title: MealFinder (iOS)
projects.description: SwiftUI app that searches recipes by ingredient using the Spoonacular API. Includes detailed recipe views and dynamic filtering. Published via YouTube demo due to App Store review complexity.

projects.title: Project Clean
projects.description: A maintenance reporting platform for schools with two authorization tiers — students/professors can file issues, staff can resolve them — backed by real-time Firebase sync.

projects.title: Cravers Pizza
projects.description: A pizza restaurant site built for a Hunter College web dev course. Features an image slideshow, dynamic menu, add-to-cart flow, and checkout price calculation.
